item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Astrologian's Journey III
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned astrologian─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level astrologian to 80 and complete all job quests up through “Love, Astrologically.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
